_comment: Phase 3 / Gate 3 evidence manifest — containment + self-protection. Parsed fail-closed. The dial is built INTO containment; audit precedes action; control-plane loss denies new destructive action; mTLS + anti-tamper + deny-by-default.

criteria.title: Isolation persists on control-plane partition; no new destructive action
criteria.expected: existing isolation maintained; new verdict => DENY_FAILSAFE

criteria.title: Process termination + share lockdown executed and recorded
mTLS mutual auth + encryption; bad/unauthenticated cert rejected
criteria.expected: CA-trusted accepted; rogue + no-cert rejected; identity bound to CN

criteria.title: Agent anti-tamper detects/heals tamper; unauthorized stop blocked
criteria.expected: tamper detected + self-healed; unauthorized stop blocked; authorized stop allowed

criteria.title: Control plane deny-by-default; protected actions reject unauth/ungranted
criteria.expected: unauthenticated + ungranted denied; only explicit grant allowed

criteria.title: AgentCommand executes only if authorized; else REJECT + audit
criteria.expected: destructive in MONITOR_ONLY rejected; HUMAN_GATED without distinct approver rejected

criteria.title: Destructive command bound to ActionRecord before sent (live hash-chained store)
criteria.expected: audit append precedes command; record chain-valid + attributable in the live DB

gate_checks.check: fresh-context adversarial review of the control plane
